case_title: THERESA BOWERS-HANSEN VS. WYETH LLC et al

docket_entries.description: NOT REPORTED. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-11-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. THE CASE IS COORDINATED WITH REGLAN/METOCLOPRAMIDE CASES, JCCP 4631. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. JUDGE RICHARD A. KRAMER; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; DEPT. 303.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-08-2013 CONTINUED TO SEP-11-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
